top_signals.title: Iran’s government thinks it has won the war
top_signals.summary: The Islamic republic faced devastating losses during the conflict, but the regime has gained in confidence
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Can Bankova Muster Political Will to Make Institutional Reforms During War?
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyОбозреватель —

The post Can Bankova Muster Political Will to Make Institutional Reforms During War? appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax appears on California ballots plunge on prediction markets
top_signals.summary: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax is on California's ballot dropped after reports noted that Gov. Gavin Newsom is pushing to stop the proposal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
top_signals.summary: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
